#請廣傳

香港人俾政府恰到上心口！
「反蒙面法」有機會聽日立埋
如果你連三罷公投都唔表態
你 註定輸一世！

公投截止日期：10月11日中午12點

The Government treats all HongKongers as nothing and they also want to pass the anti-mask law to tackle protesters.
It is time for us to speak up! Let’s give your opinion on performing general strike.

Deadline: 11 Oct 2019 1200 HKT

公投傳送門：http://bit.ly/2nWkSyo

Green Day ig 出post 話會延期

Postponed

GREEN DAY LIVE IN HONG KONG 2020
SHOW POSTPONEMENT

28 February 2020 – Thank you all for your kind patience. In light of the coronavirus situation, we regret to announce that Green Day Live in Hong Kong show, originally scheduled on 20 March 2020 has been postponed.

The following is a statement from the band:

We have unfortunately made the difficult decision to postpone our upcoming shows in Asia due to the health + travel concerns with coronavirus. We know it sucks, as we were looking forward to seeing you all, but hold on to your tickets we’ll be announcing the new dates very soon.

Current tickets purchased through HK Ticketing (Hong Kong) will remain valid for the rescheduled date. We are actively working with the band management on the rescheduled date and we will endeavour to announce the date very soon.

We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience caused and thank you for your understanding.

From Lushington Entertainments Team

GREEN DAY LIVE IN HONG KONG 2020
演出延期通知

2020年2月28日 — 感謝大家的耐心等候。因應當前新型冠狀病毒的情況，我們遺憾地宣布原定於2020年3月20 日舉行的Green Day Live in Hong Kong將會延期。

以下是來自樂隊的話 :

「由於新型冠狀病毒引起的健康及旅遊考慮，我們很遺憾對即將於亞洲舉行的演出作出延遲舉行的決定。我們知道這是很糟糕，我們亦十分期待與你們見面，請保留你們的門票，我們將很快宣布最新的演出日期。」

所有經快達票（香港）購買之門票均適用於更新的演出日期。我們與樂隊管理團隊正積極重新安排演出日期，並會盡快向大家公布。

我們對帶來的不便深感抱歉，並感謝您的體諒。

Lushington Entertainments團隊上

Green Day:
We have unfortunately made the difficult decision to postpone our upcoming shows in Asia due to the health + travel concerns with coronavirus. We know it sucks, as we were looking forward to seeing you all, but hold on to your tickets we’ll be announcing the new dates very soon.

經快達票使用信用卡購票，請參考以下(a)-(c)
a) 請於2020年3月20日起，攜同節目門票 (不論是否已取門票) 必須 於辦公時間內到 香港會議展覽中心的快達票售票處辦理退票手續。
b) 辦公時間：星期一至五，早上11時至晚上7時，星期六、日及公眾假期休息。
c) 退款申請人必須填妥退款申請表，連同節目門票一併交回售票處職員，門票金額將全數於四十五個工作天內全數退回閣下用以購票之信用卡戶口。
